title: TOD’S·X & Xiao Zhan Refine Outdoor Style
author: The Fashionisto
text:
Home » Campaigns » TOD’S·X & Xiao Zhan Refine Outdoor Style
SPRING/SUMMER 2026
TOD’S·X & XIAO ZHAN REFINE OUTDOOR STYLE

The latest TOD’S·X capsule brings outdoor references into conversation with the relaxed sophistication of Italian craftsmanship.

THE FASHIONISTO

/

PUBLISHED MAY 22, 2026

Xiao Zhan fronts the new TOD’S·X capsule in a head-to-toe brown set with the Meda tote in hand. Photo: Tod’s

The new TOD’S·X capsule continues the house’s creative dialogue with global ambassador Xiao Zhan, pairing outdoor references with Italian craftsmanship. Designed alongside creative director Matteo Tamburini, the exclusive selection includes technical windbreakers, suede mules, the Meda bag, and baseball caps.

TOD’S·X XIAO ZHAN CAPSULE
A softer, neutral pairing of the capsule’s windbreaker and convertible trousers, finished with the off-white Meda bag. Photo: Tod’s

The palette runs through earthy, natural tones that soften the trail-inspired references, giving the collection a more refined feel than traditional performance wear. The suede mules show the familiar Tod’s language of leather, texture, and Gommino soles, while the windbreakers add a sharper, sportier attitude.

The Gommino mule returns in tan suede with a buckled strap and the signature pebble sole. Photo: Tod’s

Tod’s brings refinement and casual dressing together through tactile materials and relaxed proportions, matching the way many men want to dress now.

Slung crossbody, the Meda bag adds a streamlined utility note to the brown windbreaker. Photo: Tod’s

Tod’s seasonal storytelling extends in the Marlin capsule for summer 2026, where nautical references replace the outdoor codes shaping this collection.

A brown canvas baseball cap rounds out the capsule’s outdoor-leaning accessories lineup. Photo: Tod’s
An off-white edition of the buckled mule plays against the earthier tones running through the rest of the capsule. Photo: Tod’s

title: Xiao Zhan Embodies Casual Luxury for Tod’s Fall 2024 Ad
author: THE FASHIONISTO
text:
Home » Campaigns » Xiao Zhan Embodies Casual Luxury for Tod’s Fall 2024 Ad
FALL/WINTER 2024
XIAO ZHAN EMBODIES CASUAL LUXURY FOR TOD’S FALL 2024 AD

THE FASHIONISTO

/

PUBLISHED SEPTEMBER 3, 2024

Pin
Xiao Zhan stars in the Tod’s fall-winter 2024 campaign. Photo: Tod’s

Tod’s returns with a new expression for its fall-winter 2024 campaign, and the spotlight is firmly on brand ambassador Xiao Zhan. Known for his graceful presence, Xiao seamlessly blends with the essence of the advertisement, set against the serene backdrop of Villa Palazzetto in Monselice, Padua.

XIAO ZHAN FOR TOD’S FALL/WINTER 2024 CAMPAIGN
Pin
Sporting a bomber jacket, Xiao Zhan fronts Tod’s fall-winter 2024 advertisement. Photo: Tod’s

Xiao Zhan’s natural charisma finds a new dimension in Tod’s collection’s sleek cuts and muted tones. Matteo Tamburini, the brand’s creative director, infuses this season’s offerings with a fresh perspective on the house’s signature saddlery, pushing the boundaries while keeping the brand’s DNA intact.

Xiao’s quiet yet powerful presence heightens the appeal of each Tod’s piece, emphasizing the sophistication the brand is known for.

Pin
Tod’s enlists Xiao Zhan as the star of its fall-winter 2024 campaign. Photo: Tod’s

Footwear anchors the season, with Xiao modeling everything from the brand’s polished leather loafers and lace-ups to sleek sneakers. His effortless demeanor adds a modern twist to Tod’s timeless luxury, bridging traditional Italian craftsmanship and contemporary style.

Pin
Tod’s brand ambassador Xiao Zhan fronts the fall-winter 2024 advertisement. Photo: Tod’s

In every look, from leather accessories to well-tailored outerwear, Xiao embodies Tod’s quintessentially Italian elegance—subtle, timeless, and infused with a casual touch. The featured collection exudes refined luxury, staying true to Tod’s ethos of blending comfort with sophistication.
